title: althaea hispida
intro: Althaea hispida, also known as the woolly marsh mallow, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, soothing, and protective effects. The health benefits of Althaea hispida include its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis. Althaea hispida can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical ointments and creams to harness its therapeutic benefits.
